output.code:
# Try to open the provided file and read contents
import os, sys, json, re

paths = ["/mnt/data/text_to_analyse.txt", "/mnt/data/file-N3ALdtfufwTX1GCB3qEUsA-Q124.txt"]
for p in paths:
    print(p, os.path.exists(p))
    if os.path.exists(p):
        with open(p, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            text = f.read()
        print("Length:", len(text))
        print(text[:4000])
        break

# Parse the text to find the blockquote lines and the quoted strings within them
import re, json

text = text

# Find all positions of quoted substrings in lines that contain a '>' character
results = []
for m in re.finditer(r"^.*>.*$", text, flags=re.M):
    line_start = m.start()
    line_end = m.end()
    line = text[line_start:line_end]
    # find quoted substrings within this line
    for q in re.finditer(r"\"([^\"]+)\"", line):
        inner = q.group(1)
        # compute global start/end excluding quotes
        span_start = line_start + q.start(1)
        span_end = line_start + q.end(1)
        results.append({
            "span_start": span_start,
            "span_end": span_end,
            "span_text": inner
        })
len(results), results[:5]

queries: Extract the list of Qur'an and Hadith citations from the provided Arabic text.

وَجَعَلَ لَكُمْ أَيْمَانَكُمْ شَرَاعًا فَأَسْبِلُوا بِهَا وَأَقِيمُوا الْوُضُوءَ وَأَقِيمُوا الْعَظَمَاتِ وَالْكَبَائِرَ وَلَا تَسْتَشِرُوا فِي الْأَمْرِ الْمُبِينِ وَأَنْتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ الْكُتُبَ الْمُبِينَةَ وَالْقُرْآنَ الْمُبِينَ.
وَجَعَلَ لَكُمْ أَيْمَانَكُمْ شَرَاعًا وَلَكُمْ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَوَاقِعُ لِتَسْتَبْقُوا فِيهَا وَلِتَعْرِفُوا الْخَيْرَ مِنْ الْبَاطِلِ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ.

# Build the citations list per schema using the two found citations
citations = []
# Map corrections
corrections = [
    {
        "sura_name": "الإسراء",
        "sura_number": 17,
        "aya_number": 85,
        "corrected_text": "وَيَسْأَلُونَكَ عَنِ الرُّوحِ ۖ قُلِ الرُّوحُ مِنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّي وَمَا أُوتِيتُمْ مِنَ الْعِلْمِ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا"
    },
    {
        "sura_name": "الأنبياء",
        "sura_number": 21,
        "aya_number": 7,
        "corrected_text": "وَمَا أَرْسَلْنَا قَبْلَكَ إِلَّا رِجَالًا نُوحِي إِلَيْهِمْ ۖ فَاسْأَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ"
    }
]

for i, res in enumerate(results):
    corr = corrections[i]
    item = {
        "span_start": res["span_start"],
        "span_end": res["span_end"],
        "span_text": res["span_text"],
        "citation_type": "Aya",
        "is_valid": False,
        "aya_reference": {
            "sura_name": corr["sura_name"],
            "sura_number": corr["sura_number"],
            "aya_number": corr["aya_number"]
        },
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": corr["corrected_text"],
        "completely_invalid": False
    }
    citations.append(item)

print(json.dumps({"citations": citations}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

# Validate that slicing matches recorded span_text
assert text[363:598] == citations[0]['span_text']
assert text[836:997] == citations[1]['span_text']
len(text), text[598:602], text[997:1005]

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":363,"span_end":598,"span_text":"وَجَعَلَ لَكُمْ أَيْمَانَكُمْ شَرَاعًا فَأَسْبِلُوا بِهَا وَأَقِيمُوا الْوُضُوءَ وَأَقِيمُوا الْعَظَمَاتِ وَالْكَبَائِرَ وَلَا تَسْتَشِرُوا فِي الْأَمْرِ الْمُبِينِ وَأَنْتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ الْكُتُبَ الْمُبِينَةَ وَالْقُرْآنَ الْمُبِينَ.","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"الإسراء","sura_number":17,"aya_number":85},"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"" ,"book_number":0,"hadith_number":0},"corrected_text":"وَيَسْأَلُونَكَ عَنِ الرُّوحِ ۖ قُلِ الرُّوحُ مِنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّي وَمَا أُوتِيتُمْ مِنَ الْعِلْمِ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":836,"span_end":997,"span_text":"وَجَعَلَ لَكُمْ أَيْمَانَكُمْ شَرَاعًا وَلَكُمْ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَوَاقِعُ لِتَسْتَبْقُوا فِيهَا وَلِتَعْرِفُوا الْخَيْرَ مِنْ الْبَاطِلِ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ.","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"الأنبياء","sura_number":21,"aya_number":7},"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"" ,"book_number":0,"hadith_number":0},"corrected_text":"وَمَا أَرْسَلْنَا قَبْلَكَ إِلَّا رِجَالًا نُوحِي إِلَيْهِمْ ۖ فَاسْأَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ","completely_invalid":false}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
